title: excoecaria formosana var. daitoinsularis
intro: Excoecaria formosana var. daitoinsularis, also known as the Daito Island excoecaria, is a plant species within the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is a medicinal herb that has been traditionally used in various cultures to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its sap, which contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The sap can be used to prepare various herbal preparations, including topical creams and ointments, which can be applied directly to the affected area to relieve pain and promote healing.
